# Rashid — Full-Stack Developer & AI Engineer
> Building the future with code & AI.

## Projects

### Games
- Farm Game (3D farming simulation): https://rashid-wep.vercel.app/games/farm-game/
- Kingcraft Game: https://rashid-wep.vercel.app/games/kingcraft-game/
- Rust Construction (3D building): https://rashid-wep.vercel.app/games/rust-game/

### Apps
- Calculator App: https://rashid-wep.vercel.app/apps/calculator-app/
- Quran App (digital Quran reader): https://rashid-wep.vercel.app/apps/quran-app/
- Quiz App (interactive quizzes): https://rashid-wep.vercel.app/apps/quiz-app/
- Maarifah Web (knowledge platform): https://rashid-wep.vercel.app/apps/maarifah-web/
